testcase.name: testStress_HighConstraints
testcase.system-out: 12:06:39.618 [main] INFO com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 开始试错分配算法（优化版），任务数: 20, 机台数: 3 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2001 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2002 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2003 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2004 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2005 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2006 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2007 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 剪枝触发，尝试次数: 2008 12:06:39.637 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 试错分配失败，耗时: 19ms 12:06:39.637 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - === 性能指标 === 12:06:39.637 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 总耗时: 19ms 12:06:39.637 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 总分配次数: 2008 12:06:39.637 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 缓存命中次数: 3973 12:06:39.637 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 回溯次数: 2008 12:06:39.637 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 缓存命中率: 197.86% === 高约束压力测试 === 耗时: 19ms 成功: false 分配明细数: 0

testcase.name: testStress_CapacityBottleneck
testcase.system-out: 12:06:39.640 [main] INFO com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 开始试错分配算法（优化版），任务数: 20, 机台数: 5 12:06:39.647 [main] WARN com.jinyu.aps.service.AlgorithmServiceOptimized - 试错分配失败，耗时: 7ms 12:06:39.647 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - === 性能指标 === 12:06:39.647 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 总耗时: 7ms 12:06:39.647 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 总分配次数: 325 12:06:39.647 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 缓存命中次数: 626 12:06:39.647 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 回溯次数: 325 12:06:39.647 [main] INFO PERFORMANCE - 缓存命中率: 192.62% === 产能瓶颈压力测试 === 耗时: 7ms 成功: false 实际分配量: 0

testcase.name: testStress_MultipleIterations

failure.message: 性能应稳定，最大耗时不应超过平均耗时的2倍 ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: 性能应稳定，最大耗时不应超过平均耗时的2倍 ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:55) at
